---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or workflow improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is blocked, slow, or unsafe today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the command, behavior, or interface you want.

## Alternatives Considered

What workarounds exist today, and why are they not enough?

## Additional Context

Examples, prior art, or constraints that should shape the design.
